stub: He is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background.
constituency: He is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: He tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of his party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of his constituents.
substantive: He opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, he regularly uses arguments that appeal to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
text: He is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background. He is from a constituency that is not your constituency. He tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of his party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of his constituents. He opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, he regularly uses arguments that appeal to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
